completed_tasks.name: Plan 01 — data layer (saveBaseline, loadBaseline, Firestore rules)
UAT started — Set Baseline confirmed working in browser

remaining_tasks.name: Fix UX gap: single-baseline model (overwrite vs accumulate)
Fix UX gap: Clear Baseline capability (toggle or separate button)

blockers.description: UX design decision pending: user needs to choose single-baseline vs multi-baseline model and clear-baseline UX pattern
blockers.workaround: Ask user two questions at session start: (1) single overwrite vs multi with selector, (2) toggle button vs separate clear button

human_actions_pending.action: Answer two design questions: (1) baseline model — single overwrite vs multi with selector, (2) clear UX — toggle button vs separate button
human_actions_pending.context: UAT revealed clicking 'Set Baseline' twice creates Baseline 2 silently replacing Baseline 1, and there is no way to dismiss the overlay. Fix requires a design decision before implementation.

human_actions_pending.action: Re-run UAT checks 1–7 in browser after fixes are implemented
human_actions_pending.context: 7 browser-observable items in 86.12-VERIFICATION.md require visual confirmation

decisions.decision: Baseline overlay is additive SVG only — never modifies bar fills

decisions.rationale: User sees current position and drift, not baseline position

decisions.decision: WR-01 fix: injectBaselineOverlay called immediately after saveBaseline()
decisions.rationale: Overlay must render on first save without waiting for next snapshot
Prevents mutation of Frappe's internal state

next_action: Ask user two design questions about baseline model and clear UX, then implement fix via /gsd:quick, re-run UAT, close phase
context_notes: Phase is code-complete and most UAT checks are likely fine. The two UX gaps are small fixes — single-baseline overwrite is probably 10-20 lines, clear/toggle button is another 10-20 lines. Quick task, just needs design decision first.
